name: Summertime's Bounty Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Sour Cream or Plain Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
Choose one of the following soup mixes to use in the recipe:
Onion, Onion-Mushroom or Beefy Onion.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large bowl, combine the onion recipe soup mix, ground beef, bread crumbs, sour cream or yogurt, egg and thyme or basil. Sprinkle flour into a 9-inch pie pan. Press the ground beef mixture onto the bottom and sides of the prepared pan, shaping edges 3/4 inch above the pan and forming a center "well". Bake for 40 minutes, then drain.
Fill with 3/4 cup cheese, then vegetables and remaining cheese. Bake an additional 10 minutes or until cheese is melted. Alternatively, microwave the pie: Place in a 9-inch glass pie plate and heat uncovered at HIGH (Full Power) for 9 minutes, turning the plate every 3 minutes. Fill as above and continue heating for another 3 minutes at HIGH (Full Power) or until cheese is melted. Let stand covered for 5 minutes before serving.
